title: Recreational facilities
doc_html:
§3087.87.  Recreational facilities

The board of commissioners shall also provide for the construction of public access boat ramps in the district to allow for and maintain public access to Caddo Lake for recreational purposes.

Acts 1995, No. 345, §1.
doc_text:
§3087.87.  Recreational facilities
The board of commissioners shall also provide for the construction of public access boat ramps in the district to allow for and maintain public access to Caddo Lake for recreational purposes.
Acts 1995, No. 345, §1.
